zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson於1110年之前出生在瑞士瓦特拉 薩拉茲時，他的父親Ebles I de Grandson23歲，母親Adélaïde de Limbourg18歲。他於大約1132年與Jordane de la Sarraz在瑞士瓦特拉 薩拉茲結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於從1158年到1159年在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם，埋葬在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson于1110年之前出生在瑞士瓦特拉 薩拉茲时，他的父亲Ebles I de Grandson23岁，母亲Adélaïde de Limbourg18岁。他于大约1132年与Jordane de la Sarraz在瑞士瓦特拉 薩拉茲结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于从1158年到1159年在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם，埋葬在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Ebal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beale , from Old French bel(e) ‘fair, lovely’ (see Beau ), either a nickname for a handsome man or a metronymic from this word used as a female personal name.

English (northern): habitational name from any of the places so named in Northumberland and Yorkshire. The former of these (Behil in early records) is named with Old English bēo ‘bee’ + hyll ‘hill’; the latter (Begale in Domesday Book) with Old English bēag ‘ring’, here probably used in the sense ‘river bend’, or an unattested personal name Bēaga derived from this word + halh ‘nook, recess’ (see Beagle 2). An additional source may be Beald, a farm in Cambridgeshire, recorded as Bele super Dedhil, c. 1195. In Lincolnshire, the surname is perhaps from a word or name for a farm derived from Scandinavian bøli ‘farm’.
French (Béal): topographic name for someone who lived by a mill race, from the Lyonnaise dialect term béal, bezale, bedale (of Gaulish origin).

variants.name: Beale
meanings: Yiddish name probably derived from the Slavic element beli ‘white’, although some believe it to be from the Romance adjective bella ‘beautiful’.

variants.name: Belson
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages as either a patronymic from   Neil   or a metronymic from   Nell .  Use as a given name probably began as a tribute to the British admiral  Lord Nelson  (  1758–1805 ), the victor of the Battle of Trafalgar;  see also  Horatio .  It is, however, now much more common in the United States than in Britain, its popularity there in the 1930s and 40s no doubt having been influenced by the American film actor and singer  Nelson Eddy  (  1901–67 ). Nowadays the name is universally associated with the South African statesman  Nelson Mandela  (  b. 1918 ).

variants.name: Beall
meanings: Irish: Bâll, a member, one of a community, society, or association. Baull has the same root.

en.lifeSummary: When Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson was born before 1110, in La Sarraz, Vaud, Switzerland, his father, Ebles I de Grandson, was 23 and his mother, Adélaïde de Limbourg, was 18. He married Jordane de la Sarraz about 1132, in La Sarraz, Vaud, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died from 1158 to 1159, in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, and was buried in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson est né avant 1110, à La Sarraz, Vaud, Suisse, son père, Ebles I de Grandson, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde de Limbourg, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Jordane de la Sarraz environ 1132, à La Sarraz, Vaud, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé du 1158 au 1159, à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël, et a été enterré à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson vor 1110 in La Sarraz, Waadt, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ebles I de Grandson 23 und seine Mutter Adélaïde de Limbourg 18. Er hat um 1132 in La Sarraz, Waadt, Schweiz Jordane de la Sarraz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb von 1158 bis 1159 in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel und wurde in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson è nato il prima del 1110 nel La Sarraz, Vaud, Svizzera, il suo padre, Ebles I de Grandson, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïde de Limbourg, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Jordane de la Sarraz circa 1132, nel La Sarraz, Vaud, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì da 1158 a 1159, nel Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele, e fu sepolto a Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele.

ja.La Sarraz Waadt, Switzerland: スイスヴァウドラ サラズ
ja.Grandson, Waadt, Switzerland: スイスヴァウドグランドソン
ja.La Sarraz, Vaud, Switzerland: スイスヴァウドラ サラズ
ja.Grandson, Vaud, Switzerland: スイスヴァウドグランドソン
ja.lifeSummary: Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandsonが1110年以前にスイスヴァウドラ サラズで生まれた時，父Ebles I de Grandsonは23歳，母Adélaïde de Limbourgは18歳であった。約1132年にスイスヴァウドラ サラズでJordane de la Sarrazと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼はから1158年まで1159年にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםで死去し，イスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson(이)가 1110년 이전 스위스 바드 라 사라즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ebles I de Grandson(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïde de Limbourg(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1132년 스위스 바드 라 사라즈에서 Jordane de la Sarraz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1158년 부터 1159년 까지 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에서 사망했으며 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson nasceu antes 1110, em La Sarraz, Vaud, Suiça, seu pai, Ebles I de Grandson, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde de Limbourg, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Jordane de la Sarraz aproximadamente 1132, em La Sarraz, Vaud, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu de 1158 a 1159, em Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, e foi sepultado em Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson родился перед 1110 г. в местности ла сарраз, вауд, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Ebles I de Grandson было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde de Limbourg, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Jordane de la Sarraz около 1132 г. в местности ла сарраз, вауд, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер с 1158 по 1159 в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль и был похоронен в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson nació antes de 1110, en La Sarraz, Vaud, Suiza, su papá, Ebles I de Grandson, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Adélaïde de Limbourg, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Jordane de la Sarraz aproximadamente 1132, en La Sarraz, Vaud, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió desde 1158 hasta 1159, en Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, y fue sepultado en Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.
